name: living-docs
description: Maintain a visual HTML documentation system for any codebase — domain (extensible) × type (architecture / changes / plans), plus a system-wide architecture page, roadmap, and auto-aggregated glossary. Shared CSS (centered body + sticky TOC), pure-CSS architecture box diagrams, local-vendored mermaid flowcharts, a validation gate, and scaffolding scripts. Cross-platform skill installable on Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, and other agents.
